bird.name: 西伯利亚山雀
bird.summary: 西伯利亚山雀（学名：Poecile cinctus）也称灰头山雀，一种分布于欧亚大陆和北美大陆北部地区的雀形目鸟类，隶属于山雀科高山山雀属。本种由荷兰博物学家彼得·博达尔特于1783年描述发表。 西伯利亚山雀目前有4个亚种： P.

relations.subject: 西伯利亚山雀
relations.evidence: This dramatic reduction is attributed to the interspecies competition with willow tits and great tits, decreased vegetation due to climate change, and logging of old-growth trees which are preferred over new-growth trees
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

relations.subject: 西伯利亚山雀
relations.evidence: This dramatic reduction is attributed to the interspecies competition with willow tits and great tits, decreased vegetation due to climate change, and logging of old-growth trees which are preferred over new-growth trees
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
